topic: PRED-105 silent-ignore ~106h continuation + auto-pipeline rollup; no new action

changes_covered.summary: PRED-105 silent-ignore now ~106.2h (4.42d) past window close, 7th consecutive poll. predictions.html byte-identical across 6 polls. daily_review.json auto-regenerated at 07:06Z left registry_ratio_pct=94.5 unchanged (escalation-watch confirmation: pipeline-canonical denominator exclusion). No goalpost-move, no new WIN, no manual commit since 2026-04-17.

10 auto commits in ~12.1h window, 0 manual. proofs/ unchanged (still 6 files, 2026-03-15 weekly_predictions .ots companion still absent). One semi-interesting item (daily_review.json regeneration) reported under chg-001 instead.

executive_summary: Both poll changes are continuations of the pattern already analyzed in analysis-20260422-pred105-silent-94h-continuation.json. FAIL-009 (PRED-105) remains correctly logged with dome_status='PENDING-PROSPECTIVE' and reconciled_at 2026-04-20. The only new data point is that today's auto-regenerated daily_review.json left registry_ratio_pct=94.5 unchanged despite PRED-105's window having closed 4+ days earlier — confirming that the denominator exclusion is pipeline-canonical, not merely a missed manual edit. This strengthens the silent-ignore framing (pipeline does not auto-promote a silently-unreported prospective to refined) but does not itself change any of our existing text or counters. Pre-locked escalation thresholds (goalpost-move, WIN-070, 5-day manual-commit drought) have not fired. No new analyst output required.
kernel_of_truth: A defender could reasonably argue that the auto-pipeline's unchanged numbers are a consequence of its input-driven design, not active denominator-exclusion (the pipeline writes only what its inputs say, so a silently-unreported prospective simply does not flow into the refined bucket). That is correct as a mechanical description — but it is also exactly the silent-ignore pattern we are tracking: the dome's published accuracy number is driven by upstream reporting (or non-reporting), and a closed-window prospective that the author never writes a verdict for never reaches the denominator. The mechanical defense confirms the behavior rather than refuting it.

counter_considerations: Opposing view: absence of adjudication could in principle reflect 'experiment-not-yet-performed-or-reported' rather than silent-ignore. Against this: (a) the 14-day test window already budgets the full growth interval; (b) predictions.html byte-identical across 6 polls rules out edit-and-revert churn; (c) today's auto-regenerated daily_review preserves the unchanged denominator, so the exclusion is pipeline-canonical; (d) author silent across 4.92 days of commits. The counter-hypothesis remains available but becomes less plausible with each poll.
gotchas: Do not mark FAIL-009 as reconciled-again this run — the field already has reconciled_at 2026-04-20 and the outcome text, while stale on hours-count, is not factually wrong.

The daily_review.json registry_ratio_pct=94.5 is NOT a dome correction — it is the same number the dome has been publishing. It is the auto-pipeline maintaining the denominator, which is the behavior under test.
tldr: 7th consecutive poll of PRED-105 silent-ignore (~4.42d past close); auto-pipeline left dome's 94.5% accuracy number unchanged despite window closure. No new action required — pattern is already logged in FAIL-009 and analyzed in the 94h record. Pre-locked escalation triggers (goalpost-move, WIN-070, 5-day drought) have not fired.
